name: PT Sentul City Tbk
summary: PT Sentul City Tbk engages in the construction, real estate, and services activities in Indonesia. It operates through Real Estate and Other segments. The company develops and sells land, residential houses, shop houses, apartments, commercial buildings, etc. It is also involved in the town, and air/water management activities; amusement park and hospital management activities; apartment management activities; and operation of restaurants and tourism, as well as provision of parking services. The company was formerly known as PT. Bukit Sentul Tbk and changed its name to PT Sentul City Tbk in July 2006. PT Sentul City Tbk was founded in 1993 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Sentul City Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sakti Generasi Perdana.
